name: recipe-web
description: Recipe Photo Preset Converter - Web Interface Build Scripts

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.build:css: echo 'CSS minification: Already optimized (critical CSS inlined)'
scripts.minify:js: terser web/static/main.js web/static/upload.js web/static/batch-converter.js web/static/converter.js web/static/downloader.js web/static/error-handler.js web/static/file-handler.js web/static/format-detector.js web/static/format-selector.js web/static/parameter-display.js web/static/privacy-messaging.js web/static/responsive.js web/static/wasm-loader.js --compress --mangle --output web/static/bundle.min.js --source-map

author: Justin
